## Description
<!-- Required: Describe what was done and why. -->


## Type of change
- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — refactoring without behavior change
- [ ] test — adding or updating tests
- [ ] chore — configuration, build, dependencies

## Checklist
- [ ] Debug and release builds pass locally
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] No Room schema change without migration
- [ ] No new dependency without an entry in `libs.versions.toml`
